body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. (1) Title is imperative ('create'), names subsystem ('agent') and the precise change ('execute-bead evidence bundles inside attempt worktree'). (2) Root cause cites five specific file:line ranges across three files with per-site explanation. (3) AC is fully numbered with 8 items; items 1–4 each name a distinct Test* function; item 6 embeds a -run filter with all four test names. (4) Wired-in assertion present in AC 6 via explicit -run filter. (5) Final gate lines present: AC 7 is 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/... passes', AC 8 is 'lefthook run pre-commit passes'. (6) Labels carry phase:2, three area: tags, kind:bug, plus reliability, prevention, and spec:FEAT-010 cross-refs. (7) Parent ddx-31e07fdc and dep ddx-7cb3153d are explicit with dependency rationale. (8) Description is fully self-contained — no /tmp paths, no chat-session references, dep relationship explained inline. Minor note: AC 5 ('Existing evidence bundle readers still load…') is behavioral but does not name a Test* function; it is covered by the broad go test run in AC 7 and does not warrant a deduction given the four named tests in items 1–4.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"base_rev":"56d528de2a807f3dc7c3c4a6de61c2f75f15cc0b","classification":"correctness","decode_warnings":[{"field":"suggested_amendments","warning":"expected array; dropped malformed field","raw_excerpt":"["Fix prepareArtifacts / createArtifactBundle to write all bundle files (prompt.md, manifest, embedded/ subdir) under wtPath/.ddx/executions/<attemptID>/ rather than projectRoot. The test open error on prompt.md proves the directory is being created at the old projectRoot path.","Fix gate evaluation regression: required gates are being returned as 'skipped' instead of 'pass'/'fail', causing TestExecuteBead_RequiredGatePass_Merges and TestExecuteBeadGatePass to fail.
